name: Sweet Sweet
overview: Tian Tian, a cheerful graduate, discovers that aircraft mechanic Su Mu, who has aphasia, can only speak normally after eating her homemade ice cream. Their unique bond leads to a sweet arrangement, gradually melting into an unexpected romance.

trailers.title: 《住我对面的小哥哥/Sweet Sweet》终极预告：冷面小哥哥高甜开撩｜赵弈钦 丁一一 潘紫妍 刘彦呈 何与 刘芷微 王添羽【捷成华视偶像剧场】
